end return(function(s,a,t,g,b,z,C,R,y,W,P,S,G,v,n,q,f,T,K,m,E)n,P,v,W,G,K,R,S,E,m,y,q,f,T={},521579-521579,function(s)local u,S=-294088+294089,s[935919-935918]while S do S=#b return a(C)end,function(s,u)local a=m(u)local t=function()return S(s,{},u,a)end return t end,function(s)for u=55859-55858,#s,-53269+53270 do W[s[u]]=W[s[u]]+(-105052-(-105053))end if t then local S=t(true)local a=b(S)a[u(460094+-509799)],a[u(-484793+435135)],a[u(-859542+809807)]=s,v,function()return 591824+-1444504 end return S else return g({},{[u(-328358+278700)]=v;[u(-476694-(-426989))]=s;[u(-611192+561457)]=function()return-188973+-663707 end})end end,function(s,u)local a=m(u)local t=function(...)return S(s,{...},u,a)end return t end,function(s,u)local a=m(u)local t=function(t,g,b)return S(s,{t,g;b},u,a)end return t end,function(s,u)local a=m(u)local t=function(t,g,b,z)return S(s,{t;g,b;z},u,a)end return t end,function(s,u)local a=m(u)local t=function(t,g,b,z,C,n,W)return S(s,{t,g;b,z;C,n,W},u,a)end return t end return(y(10455111-840666,{}))(a(C))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[u(974037-1023652)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
